_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to help create short texts together and put pictures in the right order.

_source.w: We are learning to help create short texts together and put pictures in the right order.
y: Creating texts with others teaches us how stories and information are organised.
Putting pictures in order helps us understand that events happen in a sequence.
This is the foundation for writing our own stories and information texts.
eg: We use sentence starters like 'I like' and add our own idea to make a sentence like 'I like swimming'.
We put three or more words together to share an idea in a class text.
We put pictures in order to show what happened first, next and last.
We help the teacher decide what to write in our shared class story.
We arrange photos from an excursion in the order they happened.
We contribute an idea to a class book by choosing images and words.
